dependencies: Agricultural commodities including corn, wheat, rice, potato flakes, vegetable oils, sugar and cocoa
Cartonboard, corrugate, and flexible packaging materials
Natural gas and propane for processing equipment
Third-party suppliers for materials and manufacturing
Independent third parties for supply of materials and manufacture of products
risks: Price fluctuations in raw materials due to government policy, regulation, global geopolitical conditions, drought, weather conditions, climate change, pandemic illness, environmental regulation

Supply chain disruptions from business disruptions, weather, natural disasters, water availability, fires, terrorism, political unrest, government restrictions, tariffs, trade restrictions, cybersecurity breaches, health pandemics
Operational difficulties with third-party manufacturers including cost increases, availability reductions, production delays, failures to meet deadlines, quality control issues
Concentration risk if third-party supplier or manufacturer fails
Transportation cost increases and reduced availability of drivers and railroad workers
Inflationary pressures on procurement and manufacturing costs

regulatory_risks: Compliance with U.S. laws affecting operations outside the United States (OFAC trade sanction regulations, Anti-Boycott regulations)
Compliance with anti-corruption laws (FCPA, UK Bribery Act)
Compliance with antitrust and competition laws
Data privacy laws (GDPR, CCPA, CPRA)
Artificial intelligence regulations
Food safety requirements and regulations
Advertising and labeling laws and regulations
Trade and pricing practices regulations
Environmental laws and regulations
New or increased tariffs, quotas, trade barriers, trade sanctions, embargoes
Changes in tax laws, interpretation of tax laws
Income tax regulations and audits
Product liability and consumer fraud claims
Changes in food quality and safety regulations
Ingredient content regulations
Serving size regulations
Front of pack labeling regulations
Corporate sustainability reporting requirements (EU and elsewhere)
Packaging sustainability regulations (including plastics)
Climate change and environmental policies
Single use plastics regulations
Brexit-related regulatory divergence between EU and UK
OECD global minimum corporate income tax framework
Changes in international trade policies and export regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions impacting operations in certain countries
Potential sanctions on trade with specific countries
Russia business divestiture due to geopolitical situation
Trade restrictions and export regulations affecting operations
